subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! It is mentioned in tradition that on the Day of Resurrection the earth shall be drawn close together, yet they comprehend it not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء در خبر است که در یوم رستخیز زمین بیکدیگر نزدیک گردد اما ندانستند
subcodes.subjects: @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
